name: Fettucini Alfonso
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15.5 oz.) Great Northern Beans, rinsed and drained well
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the corn kernels by placing them in a mesh strainer and running hot water over them until completely thawed. Drain well.
2. In a blender, combine the thawed corn, milk, and onion granules. Blend until smooth (it may take several minutes).
3. Pour the blended mixture into a medium saucepan and stir in the beans. Warm over low heat until heated through, stirring often.
4. While the sauce is heating, cook the fettucini in a large pot of boiling water until al dente. Drain well and return to the pot.
5. Add the hot sauce to the pasta and toss until evenly coated. Serve immediately, topping each portion with a generous amount of cracked black pepper.
Per serving (6): Calories: 251, Protein: 1 gm., Carbohydrate: 30 gm., Fat: 1 gm.
